title: Diamond Chicken
description: Adds a rare Diamond chicken to your world.
body:
![mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e54b68d6d883243cce2e8ec726f0d3eeadc6358.png)
**If you like diamonds and chickens this is the right mod for you, because it adds the diamond chicken mob wich drops diamonds if hurt.**

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
![Diamond Chickens](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a35be380a1a1573bc433c33a059cdea4a1664d17.png)
### Spawning
the chicken is a little bit rareer than a witch and can spawn i groups from 1-3.

![Chicken](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74d18377b17e363b42334afa6c18db24b1af47c0.png)
